description: XGB session policy - controls which session heads are enabled/disabled

US.rationale: US head disabled due to high drift (KS=0.227619, PSI=0.277938). Transformer will handle US decisions.

notes.neutral_probs: When disabled with mode='neutral_probs', returns (1/3, 1/3, 1/3) for (p_long, p_short, p_flat) and uncertainty=1.0
notes.re_enable_requirements: US must meet GO policy on canonical benchmark (KS<0.16, PSI<0.15) before re-enabling
